title: TTP Trust Token JWT Payload
description: The decoded payload of a TTP trust token JWT. The full token is a signed JWT (alg: EdDSA) containing these claims.

ttp_version.description: Protocol version used to produce this token.

sub.description: Agent identifier. Matches the agent_id in contributing receipts.

iss.description: Trust Authority base URL. Verifiers MUST match this against their configured authority URL.

exp.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) of token expiration. MUST be ≤ iat + 600.

jti.description: Unique token identifier. Used by verifiers for replay detection. Format: 'tok_' followed by 16 hex chars.

ttp_domain.description: Trust domain this token is valid for. Verifiers MUST reject tokens where this does not match their required domain.

ttp_score.description: Aggregated trust score [0.0, 1.0] as computed by the Trust Authority aggregation algorithm.

ttp_issuer_count.description: Number of distinct issuers whose receipts contributed to this score. Verifiers MAY require a minimum.

ttp_receipt_window.description: Seconds of behavioral history reflected in this score. A window of 300 means the score covers the last 5 minutes of receipts.

TTPTokenHeader.title: TTP Trust Token JWT Header
TTPTokenHeader.description: The JWT header for a TTP trust token.

kid.description: Key ID of the Trust Authority signing key. Used by verifiers to select the correct public key.

TrustAuthorityPublicKey.title: Trust Authority Public Key (JWK)
TrustAuthorityPublicKey.description: A Trust Authority signing key in JWK format, as returned from /.well-known/ttp-keys

kid.description: Key identifier. Matches the 'kid' in trust token headers.

kty.description: Key type. MUST be 'OKP' for Ed25519.
